title: codivalia lappacea
intro: Codivalia lappacea, also known as the "Lappacea tree" or "Tongabeche", is a plant species native to Mozambique. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Codivalia lappacea include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used in the form of a paste or powder, making it a versatile herbal remedy in Mozambican folk medicine.
